title: the Food Update
description: Adds toast and other foods to Minecraft!
body:
The Food Update is a mod that adds many vanilla like items to the game, including toast, jams, burgers and chocolate milk. Perfect for a café!

<details>
<summary>What does this mod add?</summary>

Toast. Toast is made by smelting Bread in a furnace. Very nutritious but not as much as Toast with a topping. Stacks to 64.

Glowberry Jam. Crafted using a Glowberry, a Glass Bottle and Sugar. Not very nutritious. Stacks to 32.

Toast with Glowberry Jam. Crafted with Glowberry Jam and Toast. Very nutritious. Stacks to 32

Sweetberry Jam. Crafted using a Sweetberry, a Glass Bottle and Sugar. Not very nutritious. Stacks to 32. 

Toast with Sweetberry Jam. Crafted with Sweetberry Jam and Toast. Very nutritious. Stacks to 32.

Toast with Honey. Crafted with Honey and Toast. Very nutritious. Stacks to 32.

Chocolate Milk. Crafted with Milk and Cocoa Beans. Very nutritious. Stacks to 1.

Burger Bun. Crafted with Bread. Not very nutritious. Stacks up to 64.

Beef Burger. Crafted with Burger Buns and Beef. Very nutritious. Stacks up to 32.

</details>

Please notify Its_Padar (also known as its_padar on Discord) if you make a public server using this mod as they would be interested in joining.
